title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Bajaj Electricals

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Bajaj Electricals
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!
